case_title: SELLICK, BRENT VS ALLEMAND, JOHN J.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 489277 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEMAND, JOHN J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLICK, BRENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEMAND, JOHN J. $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,950.00 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,945.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 489277, RENDERED ON 5/31/89. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
